## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.11

### 🎥 Cameras
- Retries the X-Sense camera session once when the camera API reports that the account session was kicked.
- Handles denied WebRTC ticket requests without raising a Home Assistant websocket traceback.
- Keeps the existing live camera stream and recording playback paths unchanged.

### 🛠️ Fixes
- Removes a startup-maintenance listener cleanup path that could log an unknown listener removal error.
